items.title: Man Utd's Bruno Fernandes equals PL assist record
items.summary: Manchester United's Bruno Fernandes has equalled the Premier League record for the most assists recorded in a season after registering his 20th of the campaign.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
